action_text: Type "Incidents by Assigned To" into the report list search field
rationale: Use the list’s search box to find the likely standard report title “Incidents by Assigned To” directly in the Global library.

action_text: Type "Incidents by" into the report list search field
rationale: Broaden the search in case the exact report title varies; this will surface all “Incidents by …” reports to choose from.

action_text: Type "Assigned To" into the report list search field
rationale: Search by the key dimension (“Assigned To”) to capture reports that show incident counts by assignee, regardless of full title wording.

action_text: Type "assignee" into the report list search field
rationale: Try a synonym (“assignee”) to catch differently named reports that still chart incidents by agent/person.

action_text: Scroll down the report list to look for “Incidents by …” titles
rationale: If the list is alphabetically sorted, scrolling may reveal the “Incidents by …” section without needing an exact search term.
